items.briefing:
A newly discovered attack called "SearchLeak" targets Microsoft Copilot, allowing an attacker to steal data with just a single click. If your organisation uses Microsoft 365 or Copilot tools, employees should be cautious about clicking unexpected links or prompts within those environments, as this type of attack can quietly expose sensitive information without obvious warning signs.

A Willis report also confirms that cyber insurance is generally covering average breach and first-party losses for Australian businesses, which is reassuring — but coverage limits mean large incidents can still leave organisations out of pocket. **Practical tip:** Review your cyber insurance policy now to understand exactly what is and isn't covered before you need to make a claim.

featured.title: Sharon AI signs 600-petabyte sovereign AI deal with VAST
featured.quote: Australia secures sovereign AI infrastructure crucial for regulated workloads and data sovereignty.
